questions.question_text: Define compensation management and its objectives. Discuss the significance of wages, including minimum wage, fair wage, and real wage in the context of compensation management in India. 10 C1
Explain the different compensation philosophies and approaches. How do these influence compensation decisions in an organization. 10 C1
Discuss the process of strategic compensation planning. What are the key factors involved in developing a base pay system? 10 C2
Explain the various components of a job evaluation system and how it helps in determining appropriate compensation. 10 C2
Discuss the strategic reasons for implementing incentive plans and how different types of incentive plans impact employee motivation and organizational success. 10 C3
Explain the role of Executive Compensation. How do executive compensation strategies differ from regular employee compensation? 10 C3
Discuss the role of employee benefits in enhancing job satisfaction and retention 10 C04
Discuss the importance of creating a work-life balance program as part of managing employee benefits. How does it affect employee performance and satisfaction? 10 C04
